---
title: "FENCE: Feasibility-ENforced Constrained nEural Solver for End-to-End Constrained Optimization"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "H. Wang"
  - "X. Xiao"
  - "H. Xu"
year: 2026
venue: "ICML"
status: "under-review"
type: "first-author"
doi: ""
url: ""
keywords:
  - "end-to-end optimization"
  - "constrained optimization"
  - "feasibility guarantees"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Under Review (ICML 2026)

This manuscript develops a feasibility-enforced neural solver for end-to-end constrained optimization with explicit constraint handling.
